summary: NT Commerce 12.0 Iteration 66 - Complete testing of Permissions, Smart Notifications, Repairs, Defective Goods, Backup System, and Wallet features. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly except SmartNotificationsPage which has no route defined.

integration_issues.issue: SmartNotificationsPage.js exists at /app/frontend/src/pages/SmartNotificationsPage.js but has no route defined in App.js. The /smart-notifications route doesn't exist.
integration_issues.suggested_fix: Add route for SmartNotificationsPage in App.js: <Route path="/smart-notifications" element={<ProtectedRoute><SmartNotificationsPage /></ProtectedRoute>} />

action_items: Add route for SmartNotificationsPage in App.js to enable /smart-notifications URL
critical_code_review_comments: All 29 backend API tests passed - Permissions catalog returns 185 permissions across 33 modules
Role templates API returns 8 templates (owner, manager, cashier, salesperson, technician, accountant, warehouse_keeper, viewer)
Smart Notifications API working correctly - GET, unread-count, mark-all-read, stats all functional
Repairs API working - tickets CRUD, stats, spare parts, technicians all tested
Defective Goods API working - stats, goods CRUD, categories, inspections tested
Backup System API working - create, list, stats, schedules functional
Wallet API working - wallet info, transactions endpoint working
2FA status API working for both admin and tenant users
Frontend pages verified: /permissions, /repairs, /repairs/new, /defective-goods, /backup-system, /wallet-management, /notifications all load correctly
SmartNotificationsPage.js exists but lacks routing - page code is complete but not accessible via URL

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load except missing SmartNotifications route)

seed_data_creation: Created test repair ticket and defective goods item during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 66 tested and working. Permissions system has 185 permissions across 33 modules with 8 role templates. Smart Notifications backend API works but frontend page at SmartNotificationsPage.js is not routed in App.js. Correct routes: /permissions, /repairs, /repairs/new, /defective-goods, /backup-system, /wallet-management (not /wallet), /notifications (general notifications, not smart notifications). The /notifications page shows the general notifications page, not SmartNotificationsPage.

smart_notifications_api.unread_count: PASS - Returns unread count with severity breakdown

frontend_pages.repairs_page: PASS - /repairs shows repair tracking with 5 total tickets
frontend_pages.smart_notifications_page: NOT ROUTED - Page exists but no route in App.js
